title: Update dependency macos to v26
body:
This PR contains the following updates: | Package | Type | Update | Change | |---|---|---|---| | [macos](https://redirect.github.com/actions/runner-images) | github-runner | major | `15` → `26` | --- ### Release Notes
actions/runner-images (macos) ### [`v26`](https://redirect.github.com/actions/runner-images/releases/tag/macos-26-arm64/20260427.0026): macos-26-arm64 (20260427) Image Update | Announcements | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | [macOS 26 (Tahoe) is now generally available in GitHub Actions](https://redirect.github.com/actions/runner-images/issues/13739) | | [\[macOS\] The macOS 14 Sonoma based runner images will begin deprecation on July 6th and will be fully unsupported by November 2nd for GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps](https://redirect.github.com/actions/runner-images/issues/13518) | *** ### :desktop\_computer: Actions Runner Image: macOS 26 - OS Version: macOS 26.3 (25D125) - Kernel Version: Darwin 25.3.0 - Image Version: [`2026042`](https://redirect.github.com/actions/runner-images/commit/20260427).0026.1 #### :mega: What's changed? ##### Updated
Category Tool name Previous (20260422.0012.1) Current (20260427.0026.1)
Language and Runtime Kotlin 2.3.20-release-208 2.3.21-release-298
Package Management Vcpkg 2026 (build from commit 3fb54e6717) 2026 (build from commit 40717e4517)
Utilities GitHub CLI 2.90.0 2.91.0
gpg (GnuPG) 2.5.18 2.5.19
Packer 1.15.1 1.15.2
Tools AWS CLI 2.34.34 2.34.37
Browsers Google Chrome 147.0.7727.102 147.0.7727.117
Google Chrome for Testing 147.0.7727.57 147.0.7727.117
ChromeDriver 147.0.7727.57 147.0.7727.117
Microsoft Edge 147.0.3912.72 147.0.3912.86
Microsoft Edge WebDriver 147.0.3912.72 147.0.3912.86
##### Java | Version | Environment Variable | | --------------- | ---------------------- | | ~~25.0.2+10.0~~ | ~~JAVA_HOME_25_arm64~~ | | 25.0.3+9.0 | JAVA_HOME_25_arm64 | ##### Android | Package Name | Version | | -------------------- | ----------- | | ~~Android Emulator~~ | ~~36.5.10~~ | | Android Emulator | 36.5.11 | For comprehensive list of software installed on this image please click [here](https://redirect.github.com/actions/runner-images/blob/releases/macos-26-arm64/20260427/images/macos/macos-26-arm64-Readme.md).
--- ### Configuration 📅 **Schedule**: (in timezone UTC) - Branch creation - At any time (no schedule defined) - Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined) 🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied. ♻ **Rebasing**: Never, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox. 🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again. --- - [ ] If you want to rebase/retry this PR, check this box --- This PR was generated by [Mend Renovate](https://mend.io/renovate/).
